sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68221" key="mnh=stron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μνῆστρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n68221.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">betrothal, marriage,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17.3</biblScope></bibl>.<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Charis.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.34</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
